steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “To that end” signals continuation of the original goal—robots are designed to resemble humans so people interact more easily. The blank must describe an action that supports this goal.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Buttress means to strengthen or support, which directly enhances comfort. Mitigate suggests reducing something, contradicting the need to enhance comfort; constrict and repudiate have no semantic fit. That matches choice D — D is correct.
